title: Каналы
emptyDescription: Add your first channel instance to get started.

list.openChannelDetail: Open channel detail for the latest diagnosis

delete.title: Delete Channel Instance
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.keyHint: Unique slug used as channel identifier
form.credentialsEncrypted: Encrypted server-side. Never returned in API responses.

errors.keySlug: Key must be a valid slug (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only)

authStatus.useQrHint: — Use the QR login button from the channels table

detail.reviewDiagnostics: Review the latest diagnosis in this channel before changing settings.

credentials.hint: Leave fields blank to keep current values. Credentials are encrypted server-side and never returned in API responses.
credentials.noSchema: No credentials schema for this channel type.

config.noSchema: No configuration schema for this channel type.
config.webhookUrlLabel: Set this as your Lark app's Event Request URL:

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.noData: No recent channel checks recorded yet.

managers.description: Manage which users have manager permissions in group chats.
managers.noManagerGroupsHint: Use the form below to add a manager to a group.

addForm.title: Add Manager to New Group
addForm.hint: Add a manager to a group that doesn't appear in the list above.

errors.groupUserRequired: Group ID and User ID are required

app_token.label: App-Level Token
app_token.help: App-Level Token with connections:write scope (required for Socket Mode)

user_token.label: User Token (Optional)
user_token.help: Optional: User OAuth Token for custom bot identity. Leave empty to use default bot identity.

api_server.label: API Server URL
api_server.help: Custom Telegram Bot API server for large file uploads (up to 2GB). Leave empty for default.

proxy.label: HTTP Proxy
proxy.help: Route bot traffic through an HTTP proxy

require_mention.label: Require @mention in groups
require_mention.disabledHint: Multi-bot mode always listens to all messages

mention_mode.label: Group Response Behavior
mention_mode.help: How the bot decides when to respond in groups with multiple bots.

history_limit.label: Group History Limit
history_limit.help: Max pending group messages for context (0 = disabled)

draft_transport.label: Draft Preview
draft_transport.help: Use stealth draft preview for answer stream in DMs — no notification per edit (requires DM Streaming)

reasoning_stream.label: Show Reasoning
reasoning_stream.help: Display AI thinking as a separate message before the answer (requires streaming)

block_reply.label: Block Reply
block_reply.help: Deliver intermediate text during tool iterations

connection_mode.label: Connection Mode
connection_mode.help: WebSocket needs no public IP — outbound connection only

webhook_path.label: Webhook Path
webhook_path.help: Path on main server for Lark events

topic_session_mode.label: Topic Session Mode
topic_session_mode.help: Use thread root_id for session isolation

native_stream.label: Native Streaming (Agents & AI Apps)
native_stream.help: Use Slack's ChatStreamer API for native streaming. Falls back to edit-in-place if unavailable.

debounce_delay.label: Debounce Delay (ms)
debounce_delay.help: Milliseconds to wait before dispatching rapid messages. Set 0 to disable.

thread_ttl.label: Thread Participation TTL (hours)
thread_ttl.help: Hours before bot stops auto-replying in threads it participated in. 0 = always require @mention.

skills.label: Skills Filter
skills.help: Limit available skills for this group

tools.label: Tool Allowlist
tools.help: Restrict which tools the agent can use in this group

platform.label: Платформа
platform.help: Select the platform this Pancake page serves.

groupOverrides.title: Group & Topic Overrides
groupOverrides.hint: Override channel defaults per group chat or forum topic. Use "*" as group ID for wildcard defaults.

draft_transport.label: Draft Preview
draft_transport.help: Use stealth draft preview for answer stream in DMs — no notification per edit (requires DM Streaming)

reasoning_stream.label: Show Reasoning
reasoning_stream.help: Display AI thinking as a separate message before the answer (requires streaming)

fields.allowedUsersPlaceholder: One user ID per line or comma-separated
fields.skillsPlaceholder: One skill name per line (empty = inherit)
fields.toolAllowHint: Restrict which tools are available in this group. Supports group names like "group:web", "group:fs". Empty = inherit all tools.
fields.systemPromptPlaceholder: Additional system prompt for this group/topic

zaloPersonal.formBanner: After creating, you'll authenticate via QR code and configure allowed users.

whatsapp.formBanner: After creating, scan the QR code with WhatsApp to authenticate.

fallback.authRequiredDetail: Channel instance is enabled but requires sign-in before it can connect.
fallback.authRequiredHint: Authenticate this channel again to restore the current session.
fallback.missingCredentialsDetail: Channel instance is enabled but required credentials are incomplete.
fallback.missingCredentialsHint: Open credentials and fill the missing or invalid values for this channel.

scopes.title: Required API Permissions
scopes.description: Your Lark/Feishu app must have these scopes enabled in the Developer Console. Publish a new app version after adding permissions.
scopes.publishReminder: After adding scopes, set Contact Range to "All members" and publish a new app version for changes to take effect.

zalo.zaloIdsHint: Zalo user IDs or group IDs
zalo.completeQrLogin: Complete QR login to load contacts
zalo.scanHint: Scan with your Zalo app (expires in ~100s)

whatsapp.scanHint: Open WhatsApp → tap You → Linked Devices → Link a Device
whatsapp.reauthDescription: Scan the QR code with WhatsApp to link your device.
whatsapp.alreadyLinkedDetail: WhatsApp is connected. To link a different device, click Re-link — this will log out the current session.
